events.label: assistant
events.text:
Assessment written to `/app/answer.json`.

**Summary:** The purged seal from over-greasing indicates a sequence violation — grease was added without first confirming/using the relief (drain) path, so excess pressure escaped through the seal lip instead of the intended relief port, per SKF/Timken guidance on calculated fill quantities and relief-path use during relubrication. Decision: **fail**, risk **high** — work must stop, the relief path be verified/cleared, the seal inspected (and replaced if damaged), and grease reapplied per calculated quantity with a monitored run-in before continuing.
